---
title: "CV"
---

## Education and Work

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-date">2023–2026</div>
  <div class="cv-body">
    <strong>PhD in Mathematics</strong>, University of Stuttgart<br>
    Advisor: Marco Oesting<br>
    Topic: Long memory in extreme value analysis
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-date">2023–present</div>
  <div class="cv-body">
    <strong>Research Assistant</strong>, Institute of Stochastics and Applications, University of Stuttgart
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-date">2020–2023</div>
  <div class="cv-body">
    <strong>MSc in Mathematics</strong>, University of Stuttgart<br>
    Advisor: Jürgen Dippon<br>
    Thesis: A novel weighted mean approach to estimate the distribution function of potential outcomes in observational studies—an asymptotic analysis
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-date">2016–2020</div>
  <div class="cv-body">
    <strong>BSc in Mathematics</strong>, University of Stuttgart
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
  <div class="cv-date">2013–2018</div>
  <div class="cv-body">
    <strong>BMus in Church Music</strong>, HMDK Stuttgart
  </div>
</div>
